description: A designed slogan poster (portrait orientation) over a photograph of a person's weathered hand washing a dark-colored car with a yellow sponge, with sudsy water streaming down the wet vehicle body and a headlight visible at lower left; warm sunset light glints through trees in the background. Large bold caps text overlaid on the left reads 'IT'S TIME TO' (white) 'GET RIGHT' (bright yellow, distressed/textured font) 'WITH THE' (white) 'LAW' (very large yellow distressed font). The pun plays on the literal act of washing/'cleaning up' a car and the figurative idea of cleaning up one's legal status. Bottom left reads 'ICE.gov/IMAGE' and bottom right shows the DHS seal with the 'ICE' wordmark. This promotes ICE's IMAGE (Mutual Agreement between Government and Employers) program. The propaganda technique uses an everyday wholesome image (car washing) plus a colloquial idiom ('get right with the law') to deliver a veiled warning to employers to ensure workforce compliance or face enforcement. Target audience: business owners/employers.
notable_text: IT'S TIME TO GET RIGHT WITH THE LAW; ICE.gov/IMAGE
